parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ phone: $json.phone || $json.phone_number || $json.caller_phone || $json.contact_phone, startTime: $json.startTime || $json.start_time || $json.appointment_time || $json.scheduled_for || $json.booking_time, fullName: $json.fullName || $json.full_name || $json.name || $json.caller_name || $json.contact_name, email: $json.email || $json.email_address || $json.caller_email || $json.contact_email, purpose: $json.purpose || $json.service || $json.appointment_type || $json.appointmentType, meetingUrl: $json.meetingUrl || $json.meeting_url || $json.google_meet_url || $json.googleMeetUrl, displayCompanyName: $json.displayCompanyName || $json.display_company_name || $('Fetch client config').item.json.config.company.name, notes: $json.notes || $json.summary || $json.booking_notes, companyId: $('Fetch client config').item.json.config.company.id, telnyxAssistantId: $json.telnyxAssistantId || $json.telnyx_assistant_id || $('Fetch client config').item.json.config.telnyx.telnyxAssistantId, calledNumber: $json.calledNumber || $json.called_number || $json.to || $json.to_number || $('Fetch client config').item.json.config.telnyx.calledNumber, callId: $json.callId || $json.call_id || $json.telnyx_call_control_id || $json.call_control_id, recordingUrl: $json.recordingUrl || $json.recording_url, transcriptUrl: $json.transcriptUrl || $json.transcript_url, transcriptText: $json.transcriptText || $json.transcript_text || $json.transcript, sourceProspectId: $json.sourceProspectId || $json.source_prospect_id || $json.prospectId || $json.prospect_id }) }}
